title: Lampcrafting
description: Adds many new lamps: lamps with new patterns, shower lamps, colored lamps, large lamps, also lamps with their own mechanics. In addition, achievements are added
body:
Mod for Forge Minecraft 1.20.1 and NeoForge 1.21.1. Adds many new lamps and lamps with their own mechanics to the game. These lamps can be crafted by placing a regular lamp in the stonecutter and selecting the desired pattern, or by crafting them in the workbench. In addition, some lamps are soul lamps and have the ability to repel pygmies. There are in addition large lamps in the size of 2 by 2 blocks. Also, one of the patterns includes flat lamps that can be 16 colors corresponding to 16 dyes. And there are achievements with references in the mod.


However, in this video you can see a review of one of the lamps with its own mechanics, the solar lamp:
https://youtu.be/3PAQX9X3Z2k?si=7v4XKSi4_dA6cJUK.


And in this one, a review of the moon lamp, another lamp with its own mechanics:
https://youtu.be/cbeu9ZdP_7Y?si=L3DvBGKfIiIjMZg-


There are plans to improve the mod. Also, you, yes, you, can contribute to the development of the mod by contacting via Discord (live7688) with your ideas for new models or even mechanics for these lamps

My links https://portaly.cc/LiveEnt to view news or support
